emails.subject: RE: broker quotes
emails.body: RE: broker quotes are we saving the files out there everyday? do the traders do/know this?

emails.subject: RE: broker quotes
emails.body: I don't know who has been saving these daily. Can you tell whoever on the west desk to use the new file instead. They are for the estate and need to keep them away from the Netco files.

emails.subject: RE: broker quotes
emails.body: yup... i don't know who is saving them daily either. i'll forward this to keith though, i think he's the major recipient of the quotes.

emails.subject: RE: broker quotes
emails.body: Thanks, I beleive it is Keith and Frank.
